figures.caption: Figure 1: Test (solid lines) and train (dashed lines) errors for ϱ = ReLU, σ(x) = x. Dotted horizontal lines denote the test error for exact score function obtained using (11).
Figure 2: Score errors for linear and non-linear manifolds. Solid lines are for t = 0.001, and dashed lines are for t = 0.1.
Figure 3: Score error and sample complexity for ϱ = ReLU, σ(x) = x.
Figure 4: Comparison of test (solid lines) and train (dashed lines) errors with numerical simulations (points) for ϱ = ReLU, σ = tanh.
